rationale: No direct conflict. §26.0444's formula uses 'Current Total Value' in its denominator, which would be indirectly reduced by a larger homestead exemption, slightly altering the computed rate adjustment for defunding municipalities. No statutory text requires amendment.
quote: Municipal Public Safety Expenditure Adjustment / (Current Total Value - New Property Value)
_note: Indirect fiscal interaction only; the rule does not reference §11.13(b) or homestead exemption amounts. Comptroller rulemaking may need to confirm whether 'Current Total Value' reflects post-exemption taxable values, but no statutory text conflicts.
